prompt: I want to create a processor using connections 'kafka-prod' and 'atlas-main'. Can you verify they're ready?

test_prerequisites.workspace: Use existing workspace with at least 2 connections (Kafka + Atlas)
test_prerequisites.connections_required: Any Kafka and Atlas connections (names don't need to match prompt)
test_prerequisites.note: Test validates connection validation workflow, not specific connection names

pre_test_setup.action: Call atlas-streams-discover action='list-connections' to identify available connections
pre_test_setup.note: Use first available Kafka and Atlas connections as test subjects

post_test_validation.expected: Agent called list-connections first, then inspect-connection for each
Agent presents connection summary with states and types

assertions.name: calls_list_connections_first
assertions.description: First tool call is atlas-streams-discover with action='list-connections'
assertions.reason: Must list connections before inspecting specific ones

assertions.name: checks_connection_state_ready
assertions.description: Response verifies both connections are in READY state

assertions.name: verifies_connection_types
assertions.description: Response confirms connection types match intended usage (Kafka for kafka-prod, Cluster for atlas-main)

assertions.name: presents_summary_to_user
assertions.description: Response presents connection summary before proceeding
assertions.reason: User must confirm connections are correct before processor creation

assertions.name: validates_names_match_targets
assertions.description: Response verifies connection names match their actual targets (e.g., connection 'kafka-prod' actually points to production Kafka)

assertions.name: does_not_skip_validation
assertions.description: Does NOT skip directly to processor creation without validation

expected_workflow.description: Show connection summary: names, types, states, targets
Confirm both connections are READY and properly configured

validation_checklist: Connection type matches usage (Kafka for source, Cluster for sink)
